params.name: Golden Scarab
params.source: FTH Master Scrolls (31.5%), Fragment Crafting (15.1%), Kemetic Treasure Maps (5%), Lottery Machine (0.81%), Master Scrolls (6.5%), Relic Forge (90 Relic RF), Wishing (0.53%)
params.description:
On Aug 5, 1213 BC, this Golden Scarab was made after Ramesses' death. 

In ancient Egypt, the scarab symbolizes perseverance, fearlessness, bravery, and industriousness as it brings light and hopes to the world. This talisman is cast in gold and painted with a blue or green glaze to strengthen it. Since the period of the New Kingdom, when mummies were made, scarabs were placed on the hearts for people believe that scarabs can eliminate the mistakes of the deceased and help them get through the t …
